name: lofye/foundry-framework
description: Foundry: an explicit, LLM-first PHP web framework

suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Enable real MinIO/S3 object storage via MinioStorageDriver.
suggest.ext-redis: Enable production-grade Redis queue support via RedisQueueDriver.
suggest.ext-pdo_pgsql: Enable PostgreSQL database connectivity for integration tests and runtime deployments.
